message:
So, there I was, standing in my kitchen, a little too proud of my latest culinary creation. The smoke was rising, and I could feel my heart race—was this the moment I finally set off the smoke alarm? 😅 

But instead of a frantic dash to find the ladder and reach for the alarm, I remembered my escape plan. I had actually practiced it with the kids a few weeks ago! It felt good to know we had a plan, even if my cooking skills could use some work. 

It’s funny how being prepared can turn a potential disaster into a moment of laughter. If you haven’t thought about your family’s fire safety lately, maybe it’s time for a little refresher. This little refresher helped me feel more at ease in the kitchen! 

What’s your favorite fire safety tip that makes you feel prepared?
